          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport json\nimport logging\nimport sys\nfrom datetime import UTC, datetime\nfrom typing import Any\n\nLOG_FIELDS = (\n    \"service\",\n    \"job_id\",\n    \"stream_id\",\n    \"consumer\",\n    \"attempt\",\n    \"state\",\n    \"schedule_id\",\n    \"queue\",\n)\n\n\nclass JsonLogFormatter(logging.Formatter):\n    def format(self, record: logging.LogRecord) -> str:\n        payload: dict[str, Any] = {\n            \"timestamp\": datetime.fromtimestamp(record.created, tz=REDACTED,\n            \"level\": record.levelname,\n            \"logger\": record.name,\n            \"message\": record.getMessage(),\n        }\n        for field in LOG_FIELDS:\n            value = getattr(record, field, None)\n            if value is not None:\n                payload[field] = value\n        if record.exc_info:\n            payload[\"exc_info\"] = self.formatException(record.exc_info)\n        return json.dumps(payload, separators=REDACTED\",\", \":\"), sort_keys=REDACTED configure_logging(*, service: str, level: str) -> None:\n    handler = logging.StreamHandler(stream=REDACTED    handler.setFormatter(JsonLogFormatter())\n    root = logging.getLogger()\n    root.handlers.clear()\n    root.addHandler(handler)\n    root.setLevel(level.upper())\n    root.propagate = False\n    logging.LoggerAdapter(logging.getLogger(service), {\"service\": service})\n\n\ndef get_logger(name: str, *, service: str) -> logging.LoggerAdapter[logging.Logger]:\n    return logging.LoggerAdapter(logging.getLogger(name), {\"service\": service})\n"

          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Task registry and built-in tasks.\"\"\"\n"

        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom typing import Any\n\nfrom pydantic import BaseModel, ValidationError\n\nfrom miniq.tasks.base import TaskContext, TaskDefinition\n\n\nclass UnknownTaskError(KeyError):\n    pass\n\n\nclass TaskRegistry:\n    def __init__(self) -> None:\n        self._definitions: dict[str, TaskDefinition[Any]] = {}\n\n    def register(self, definition: TaskDefinition[Any]) -> None:\n        self._definitions[definition.name] = definition\n\n    def get(self, name: str) -> TaskDefinition[Any]:\n        try:\n            return self._definitions[name]\n        except KeyError as exc:\n            raise UnknownTaskError(name) from exc\n\n    def validate_payload(self, name: str, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> BaseModel:\n        definition = self.get(name)\n        try:\n            return definition.payload_model.model_validate(payload)\n        except ValidationError:\n            raise\n\n    @property\n    def names(self) -> set[str]:\n        return set(self._definitions.keys())\n\n    async def run(self, name: str, payload: dict[str, Any], context: TaskContext) -> dict[str, Any]:\n        definition = self.get(name)\n        validated = definition.payload_model.model_validate(payload)\n        return await definition.handler(validated, context)\n"
        },

          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport asyncio\nimport hashlib\nfrom typing import Any\n\nimport httpx\nfrom pydantic import BaseModel, Field, HttpUrl\n\nfrom miniq.retry import RetryPolicy\nfrom miniq.tasks.base import TaskContext, TaskDefinition\nfrom miniq.tasks.registry import TaskRegistry\n\n\nclass SleepPayload(BaseModel):\n    seconds: float = Field(ge=REDACTED, le=REDACTED    result: str = \"slept\"\n\n\nasync def run_sleep(payload: SleepPayload, context: TaskContext) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    await context.sleep(payload.seconds)\n    return {\"message\": payload.result, \"seconds\": payload.seconds}\n\n\nclass HttpGetPayload(BaseModel):\n    url: HttpUrl\n    timeout_seconds: float = Field(default=REDACTED, ge=REDACTED, le=REDACTED def run_http_get(payload: HttpGetPayload, _context: TaskContext) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=REDACTED as client:\n        response = await client.get(str(payload.url))\n    return {\n        \"status_code\": response.status_code,\n        \"url\": str(payload.url),\n        \"body\": response.text,\n    }\n\n\nclass CpuBurnPayload(BaseModel):\n    iterations: int = Field(ge=REDACTED, le=REDACTED    seed: str = \"miniq\"\n\n\ndef _burn_cpu(iterations: int, seed: str) -> str:\n    digest = seed.encode(\"utf-8\")\n    for index in range(iterations):\n        digest = hashlib.sha256(digest + str(index).encode(\"utf-8\")).digest()\n    return hashlib.sha256(digest).hexdigest()\n\n\nasync def run_cpu_burn(payload: CpuBurnPayload, _context: TaskContext) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    checksum = await asyncio.to_thread(_burn_cpu, payload.iterations, payload.seed)\n    return {\"iterations\": payload.iterations, \"checksum\": checksum}\n\n\nclass FailThenSucceedPayload(BaseModel):\n    failures_before_success: int = Field(ge=REDACTED, le=REDACTED    result: dict[str, Any] = Field(default_factory=REDACTED {\"message\": \"ok\"})\n\n\nasync def run_fail_then_succeed(\n    payload: FailThenSucceedPayload, context: TaskContext\n) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    if context.attempt <= payload.failures_before_success:\n        msg = f\"failing attempt {context.attempt}\"\n        raise RuntimeError(msg)\n    return payload.result\n\n\nclass PipelineDemoPayload(BaseModel):\n    steps: int = Field(default=REDACTED, ge=REDACTED, le=REDACTED    step_delay_seconds: float = Field(default=REDACTED, ge=REDACTED, le=REDACTED    label: str = \"pipeline\"\n\n\nasync def run_pipeline_demo(payload: PipelineDemoPayload, context: TaskContext) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    completed_steps = 0\n    for index in range(payload.steps):\n        if await context.is_cancel_requested():\n            raise asyncio.CancelledError(f\"canceled at step {index}\")\n        await context.sleep(payload.step_delay_seconds)\n        completed_steps += 1\n        context.logger.info(\n            \"pipeline step complete\",\n            extra=REDACTED                \"job_id\": context.job_id,\n                \"attempt\": context.attempt,\n                \"queue\": context.queue,\n            },\n        )\n    return {\"label\": payload.label, \"completed_steps\": completed_steps}\n\n\ndef register_builtin_tasks(\n    registry: TaskRegistry,\n    *,\n    default_retry_policy: RetryPolicy,\n) -> None:\n    registry.register(\n        TaskDefinition(\n            name=REDACTED\"sleep\",\n            payload_model=REDACTED,\n            handler=REDACTED,\n            retry_policy=REDACTED,\n        )\n    )\n    registry.register(\n        TaskDefinition(\n            name=REDACTED\"http_get\",\n            payload_model=REDACTED,\n            handler=REDACTED,\n            retry_policy=REDACTED,\n        )\n    )\n    registry.register(\n        TaskDefinition(\n            name=REDACTED\"cpu_burn\",\n            payload_model=REDACTED,\n            handler=REDACTED,\n            retry_policy=REDACTED,\n        )\n    )\n    registry.register(\n        TaskDefinition(\n            name=REDACTED\"fail_then_succeed\",\n            payload_model=REDACTED,\n            handler=REDACTED,\n            retry_policy=REDACTED,\n        )\n    )\n    registry.register(\n        TaskDefinition(\n            name=REDACTED\"pipeline_demo\",\n            payload_model=REDACTED,\n            handler=REDACTED,\n            retry_policy=REDACTED,\n        )\n    )\n"
        },

          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport asyncio\nfrom collections.abc import Awaitable, Callable\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\nfrom typing import Any, Generic, TypeVar\n\nfrom pydantic import BaseModel\n\nfrom miniq.retry import RetryPolicy\n\nPayloadModelT = TypeVar(\"PayloadModelT\", bound=REDACTED TaskContext:\n    job_id: str\n    job_type: str\n    queue: str\n    attempt: int\n    logger: Any\n    is_cancel_requested: Callable[[], Awaitable[bool]]\n\n    async def sleep(self, seconds: float) -> None:\n        await asyncio.sleep(seconds)\n\n\nTaskHandler = Callable[[PayloadModelT, TaskContext], Awaitable[dict[str, Any]]]\n\n\n@dataclass(frozen=True, slots=REDACTED TaskDefinition(Generic[PayloadModelT]):\n    name: str\n    payload_model: type[PayloadModelT]\n    handler: TaskHandler[PayloadModelT]\n    retry_policy: RetryPolicy\n"

      "2:LEN": {

          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport asyncio\nimport json\nimport statistics\nimport time\nfrom datetime import UTC, datetime\nfrom typing import Any\n\nimport httpx\nimport typer\n\nfrom miniq.config import get_settings\n\napp = typer.Typer(no_args_is_help=True, pretty_exceptions_show_locals=REDACTED _base_url() -> str:\n    return get_settings().api_base_url.rstrip(\"/\")\n\n\ndef _parse_payload(payload: str) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    parsed = json.loads(payload)\n    if not isinstance(parsed, dict):\n        raise typer.BadParameter(\"payload must be a JSON object\")\n    return parsed\n\n\\REDACTED(\"submit\")\ndef submit(\n    task_type: str = typer.Option(..., \"--type\"),\n    payload: str = typer.Option(\"{}\", \"--payload\"),\n    queue: str = typer.Option(\"default\", \"--queue\"),\n    max_attempts: int = typer.Option(3, \"--max-attempts\"),\n    run_at: str | None = typer.Option(None, \"--run-at\"),\n    idempotency_key: str | None = typer.Option(None, \"--idempotency-key\"),\n) -> None:\n    async def _run() -> None:\n        async with httpx.AsyncClient(base_url=REDACTED as client:\n            response = await client.post(\n                \"/jobs\",\n                json=REDACTED                    \"type\": task_type,\n                    \"payload\": _parse_payload(payload),\n                    \"queue\": queue,\n                    \"max_attempts\": max_attempts,\n                    \"run_at\": run_at,\n                    \"idempotency_key\": idempotency_key,\n                },\n            )\n            response.raise_for_status()\n            typer.echo(json.dumps(response.json(), indent=REDACTED    asyncio.run(_run())\n\n\\REDACTED(\"status\")\ndef status(job_id: str) -> None:\n    async def _run() -> None:\n        async with httpx.AsyncClient(base_url=REDACTED as client:\n            response = await client.get(f\"/jobs/{job_id}\")\n            response.raise_for_status()\n            typer.echo(json.dumps(response.json(), indent=REDACTED    asyncio.run(_run())\n\n\\REDACTED(\"cancel\")\ndef cancel(job_id: str) -> None:\n    async def _run() -> None:\n        async with httpx.AsyncClient(base_url=REDACTED as client:\n            response = await client.post(f\"/jobs/{job_id}/cancel\")\n            response.raise_for_status()\n            typer.echo(json.dumps(response.json(), indent=REDACTED    asyncio.run(_run())\n\n\\REDACTED(\"retry\")\ndef retry(job_id: str) -> None:\n    async def _run() -> None:\n        async with httpx.AsyncClient(base_url=REDACTED as client:\n            response = await client.post(f\"/jobs/{job_id}/retry\")\n            response.raise_for_status()\n            typer.echo(json.dumps(response.json(), indent=REDACTED    asyncio.run(_run())\n\n\\REDACTED(\"events-tail\")\ndef events_tail(\n    job_id: str | None = typer.Option(None, \"--job-id\"),\n    interval: float = typer.Option(1.0, \"--interval\", min=REDACTED,\n) -> None:\n    async def _run() -> None:\n        cursor: str | None = None\n        async with httpx.AsyncClient(base_url=REDACTED, timeout=REDACTED as client:\n            while True:\n                response = await client.get(\n                    \"/events\",\n                    params=REDACTED\"job_id\": job_id, \"cursor\": cursor, \"limit\": 100},\n                )\n                response.raise_for_status()\n                payload = response.json()\n                for event in payload[\"items\"]:\n                    typer.echo(json.dumps(event, indent=REDACTED                cursor = payload.get(\"next_cursor\") or cursor\n                await asyncio.sleep(interval)\n\n    try:\n        asyncio.run(_run())\n    except KeyboardInterrupt:\n        return\n\n\ndef _percentile(values: list[float], percentile: float) -> float:\n    if not values:\n        return 0.0\n    ordered = sorted(values)\n    index = max(0, min(len(ordered) - 1, round((percentile / 100) * (len(ordered) - 1))))\n    return ordered[index]\n\n\\REDACTED(\"loadtest\")\ndef loadtest(\n    jobs: int = typer.Option(100, \"--jobs\", min=REDACTED,\n    concurrency: int = typer.Option(20, \"--concurrency\", min=REDACTED,\n    task_type: str = typer.Option(\"sleep\", \"--type\"),\n    payload: str = typer.Option('{\"seconds\":0.05}', \"--payload\"),\n) -> None:\n    async def _submit_one(\n        client: httpx.AsyncClient, payload_obj: dict[str, Any]\n    ) -> tuple[str, float]:\n        start = time.perf_counter()\n        response = await client.post(\"/jobs\", json=REDACTED\"type\": task_type, \"payload\": payload_obj})\n        response.raise_for_status()\n        return response.json()[\"job_id\"], time.perf_counter() - start\n\n    async def _wait_for_terminal(client: httpx.AsyncClient, job_id: str) -> float:\n        start = time.perf_counter()\n        while True:\n            response = await client.get(f\"/jobs/{job_id}\")\n            response.raise_for_status()\n            if response.json()[\"state\"] in {\"SUCCEEDED\", \"FAILED\", \"CANCELED\", \"DEAD\"}:\n                return time.perf_counter() - start\n            await asyncio.sleep(0.05)\n\n    async def _run() -> None:\n        parsed_payload = _parse_payload(payload)\n        semaphore = asyncio.Semaphore(concurrency)\n        async with httpx.AsyncClient(base_url=REDACTED, timeout=REDACTED as client:\n\n            async def submit_with_limit() -> tuple[str, float]:\n                async with semaphore:\n                    return await _submit_one(client, parsed_payload)\n\n            submitted = await asyncio.gather(*(submit_with_limit() for _ in range(jobs)))\n            completion_latencies = await asyncio.gather(\n                *(_wait_for_terminal(client, job_id) for job_id, _ in submitted)\n            )\n        submit_latencies = [latency for _, latency in submitted]\n        summary = {\n            \"jobs\": jobs,\n            \"submit_avg_seconds\": statistics.fmean(submit_latencies),\n            \"submit_p50_seconds\": _percentile(submit_latencies, 50),\n            \"submit_p95_seconds\": _percentile(submit_latencies, 95),\n            \"submit_p99_seconds\": _percentile(submit_latencies, 99),\n            \"completion_avg_seconds\": statistics.fmean(completion_latencies),\n            \"completion_p50_seconds\": _percentile(completion_latencies, 50),\n            \"completion_p95_seconds\": _percentile(completion_latencies, 95),\n            \"completion_p99_seconds\": _percentile(completion_latencies, 99),\n            \"timestamp\": datetime.now(tz=REDACTED,\n        }\n        typer.echo(json.dumps(summary, indent=REDACTED    asyncio.run(_run())\n\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    app()\n"
        },

        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\n\nfrom redis.asyncio import Redis\nfrom sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncEngine, AsyncSession, async_sessionmaker\n\nfrom miniq.broker.redis import RedisBroker\nfrom miniq.config import Settings, get_settings\nfrom miniq.db.repository import JobRepository\nfrom miniq.db.session import create_engine, create_session_factory, ensure_db_parent, init_db\nfrom miniq.observability.logging import configure_logging, get_logger\nfrom miniq.retry import RetryPolicy\nfrom miniq.tasks.builtin import register_builtin_tasks\nfrom miniq.tasks.registry import TaskRegistry\n\n\n@dataclass(slots=REDACTED Runtime:\n    settings: Settings\n    engine: AsyncEngine\n    session_factory: async_sessionmaker[AsyncSession]\n    repository: JobRepository\n    broker: RedisBroker\n    tasks: TaskRegistry\n\n    async def initialize(self) -> None:\n        await ensure_db_parent(self.settings.db_path)\n        await init_db(self.engine)\n\n    async def close(self) -> None:\n        await self.broker.close()\n        await self.engine.dispose()\n\n\ndef build_runtime(*, service: str, settings: Settings | None = None) -> Runtime:\n    resolved_settings = settings or get_settings()\n    configure_logging(service=REDACTED, level=REDACTED    engine = create_engine(resolved_settings.database_url)\n    session_factory = create_session_factory(engine)\n    repository = JobRepository(session_factory)\n    redis_client = Redis.from_url(resolved_settings.redis_url, decode_responses=REDACTED    broker = RedisBroker(redis_client, group_name=REDACTED    registry = TaskRegistry()\n    retry_policy = RetryPolicy(\n        base_delay_seconds=REDACTED,\n        multiplier=REDACTED,\n        cap_seconds=REDACTED,\n        jitter_ratio=REDACTED,\n    )\n    register_builtin_tasks(registry, default_retry_policy=REDACTED    get_logger(service, service=REDACTED\"runtime initialized\")\n    return Runtime(\n        settings=REDACTED,\n        engine=REDACTED,\n        session_factory=REDACTED,\n        repository=REDACTED,\n        broker=REDACTED,\n        tasks=REDACTED,\n    )\n"
        },

      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport logging\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\nfrom datetime import datetime\nfrom typing import Any\n\nfrom sqlalchemy.exc import IntegrityError\n\nfrom miniq.broker.redis import RedisBroker\nfrom miniq.db.models import Job\nfrom miniq.db.repository import JobRepository\nfrom miniq.tasks.registry import TaskRegistry, UnknownTaskError\nfrom miniq.utils import new_job_id, utc_now\n\n\n@dataclass(slots=REDACTED JobService:\n    repository: JobRepository\n    broker: RedisBroker\n    tasks: TaskRegistry\n    logger: logging.LoggerAdapter[logging.Logger]\n\n    async def submit_job(\n        self,\n        *,\n        job_type: str,\n        payload: dict[str, Any],\n        queue: str,\n        max_attempts: int,\n        run_at: datetime | None,\n        idempotency_key: str | None,\n        schedule_id: str | None = None,\n        schedule: str | None = None,\n        message: str = \"job queued\",\n    ) -> Job:\n        self._validate_submission(job_type=REDACTED, payload=REDACTED        if idempotency_key is not None:\n            existing = await self.repository.get_active_job_by_idempotency_key(idempotency_key)\n            if existing is not None:\n                return existing\n        next_run_at = run_at or utc_now()\n        job_id = new_job_id()\n        try:\n            job = await self.repository.create_job(\n                job_id=REDACTED,\n                job_type=REDACTED,\n                queue=REDACTED,\n                payload=REDACTED,\n                max_attempts=REDACTED,\n                next_run_at=REDACTED,\n                idempotency_key=REDACTED,\n                schedule_id=REDACTED,\n                schedule=REDACTED,\n                message=REDACTED,\n            )\n        except IntegrityError:\n            if idempotency_key is None:\n                raise\n            existing = await self.repository.get_active_job_by_idempotency_key(idempotency_key)\n            if existing is None:\n                raise\n            return existing\n        if next_run_at <= utc_now():\n            await self.try_enqueue(job)\n        return job\n\n    async def try_enqueue(self, job: Job) -> bool:\n        try:\n            stream_id = await self.broker.enqueue(\n                queue=REDACTED,\n                job_id=REDACTED,\n                job_type=REDACTED,\n                enqueued_at=REDACTED,\n            )\n        except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001\n            self.logger.exception(\n                \"failed to enqueue job\",\n                extra=REDACTED\"job_id\": job.id, \"queue\": job.queue, \"state\": job.state},\n            )\n            return False\n        await self.repository.mark_job_enqueued(job_id=REDACTED, stream_id=REDACTED        self.logger.info(\n            \"job enqueued\",\n            extra=REDACTED                \"job_id\": job.id,\n                \"queue\": job.queue,\n                \"stream_id\": stream_id,\n                \"state\": job.state,\n            },\n        )\n        return True\n\n    async def reconcile_due_jobs(self, *, limit: int) -> int:\n        jobs = await self.repository.get_due_unenqueued_jobs(now=REDACTED, limit=REDACTED        count = 0\n        for job in jobs:\n            if await self.try_enqueue(job):\n                count += 1\n        return count\n\n    async def retry_job(self, *, job_id: str) -> Job | None:\n        next_run_at = utc_now()\n        job = await self.repository.retry_job(job_id=REDACTED, next_run_at=REDACTED        if job is not None and job.state == \"QUEUED\" and next_run_at <= utc_now():\n            await self.try_enqueue(job)\n        return job\n\n    async def queue_depths(self) -> list[tuple[str, int]]:\n        return await self.repository.count_due_jobs_by_queue(now=REDACTED    def _validate_submission(self, *, job_type: str, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> None:\n        if job_type not in self.tasks.names:\n            raise UnknownTaskError(job_type)\n        self.tasks.validate_payload(job_type, payload)\n"
        },

        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "Metadata-Version: 2.4\r\nName: miniq\r\nVersion: 0.1.0\r\nSummary: Local production-style job queue and scheduler using FastAPI, Redis Streams, and SQLite.\r\nRequires-Python: >=3.12\r\nDescription-Content-Type: text/markdown\r\nRequires-Dist: aiosqlite<1.0.0,>=0.20.0\r\nRequires-Dist: croniter<7.0.0,>=6.0.0\r\nRequires-Dist: fastapi<1.0.0,>=0.116.0\r\nRequires-Dist: httpx<1.0.0,>=0.28.0\r\nRequires-Dist: orjson<4.0.0,>=3.10.0\r\nRequires-Dist: prometheus-client<1.0.0,>=0.23.0\r\nRequires-Dist: pydantic<3.0.0,>=2.11.0\r\nRequires-Dist: pydantic-settings<3.0.0,>=2.10.0\r\nRequires-Dist: python-dateutil<3.0.0,>=2.9.0\r\nRequires-Dist: pyyaml<7.0.0,>=6.0.2\r\nRequires-Dist: redis[hiredis]<7.0.0,>=6.4.0\r\nRequires-Dist: sqlalchemy<3.0.0,>=2.0.43\r\nRequires-Dist: typer<1.0.0,>=0.16.0\r\nRequires-Dist: uvicorn[standard]<1.0.0,>=0.35.0\r\nProvides-Extra: dev\r\nRequires-Dist: fakeredis<3.0.0,>=2.31.0; extra == \"dev\"\r\nRequires-Dist: mypy<2.0.0,>=1.19.0; extra == \"dev\"\r\nRequires-Dist: pytest<10.0.0,>=9.0.0; extra == \"dev\"\r\nRequires-Dist: pytest-asyncio<2.0.0,>=1.2.0; extra == \"dev\"\r\nRequires-Dist: ruff<1.0.0,>=0.15.0; extra == \"dev\"\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "REDACTED",

      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom contextlib import asynccontextmanager\nfrom datetime import datetime\nfrom typing import Annotated\n\nfrom fastapi import Depends, FastAPI, HTTPException, Query, Request, Response, status\nfrom fastapi.responses import ORJSONResponse\nfrom sqlalchemy import text\n\nfrom miniq.api.schemas import (\n    EventListResponse,\n    HealthResponse,\n    JobListResponse,\n    JobResponse,\n    SubmitJobRequest,\n    SubmitJobResponse,\n)\nfrom miniq.config import get_settings\nfrom miniq.db.models import Job\nfrom miniq.observability.logging import get_logger\nfrom miniq.observability.metrics import render_metrics, set_queue_depths\nfrom miniq.runtime import Runtime, build_runtime\nfrom miniq.services import JobService\nfrom miniq.tasks.registry import UnknownTaskError\nfrom miniq.utils import decode_cursor\n\n\n@asynccontextmanager\nasync def lifespan(app: FastAPI):\n    runtime = build_runtime(service=REDACTED\"api\", settings=REDACTED    await runtime.initialize()\n    app.state.runtime = runtime\n    yield\n    await runtime.close()\n\n\napp = FastAPI(\n    title=REDACTED\"Miniq API\",\n    version=REDACTED\"0.1.0\",\n    default_response_class=REDACTED,\n    lifespan=REDACTED,\n)\n\n\ndef get_runtime(request: Request) -> Runtime:\n    return request.app.state.runtime\n\n\ndef get_job_service(runtime: Annotated[Runtime, Depends(get_runtime)]) -> JobService:\n    return JobService(\n        repository=REDACTED,\n        broker=REDACTED,\n        tasks=REDACTED,\n        logger=REDACTED\"miniq.api.jobs\", service=REDACTED\"api\"),\n    )\n\n\ndef _require_job(job: Job | None, job_id: str) -> Job:\n    if job is None:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=REDACTED, detail=REDACTED\"job {job_id} not found\")\n    return job\n\n\ndef _parse_cursor_datetime(value: str | None) -> datetime | None:\n    if value is None:\n        return None\n    return datetime.fromisoformat(value)\n\n\\REDACTED(\"/jobs\", response_model=REDACTED, status_code=REDACTED def submit_job(\n    payload: SubmitJobRequest,\n    service: Annotated[JobService, Depends(get_job_service)],\n    runtime: Annotated[Runtime, Depends(get_runtime)],\n) -> SubmitJobResponse:\n    queue = payload.queue or runtime.settings.default_queue\n    try:\n        job = await service.submit_job(\n            job_type=REDACTED,\n            payload=REDACTED,\n            queue=REDACTED,\n            max_attempts=REDACTED,\n            run_at=REDACTED,\n            idempotency_key=REDACTED,\n        )\n    except UnknownTaskError as exc:\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=REDACTED, detail=REDACTED\"unknown task type: {exc}\"\n        ) from exc\n    return SubmitJobResponse(job_id=REDACTED\"/jobs/{job_id}\", response_model=REDACTED def get_job(\n    job_id: str,\n    runtime: Annotated[Runtime, Depends(get_runtime)],\n) -> JobResponse:\n    job = _require_job(await runtime.repository.get_job(job_id), job_id)\n    return JobResponse.from_orm_job(job)\n\n\\REDACTED(\"/jobs/{job_id}/cancel\", response_model=REDACTED def cancel_job(\n    job_id: str,\n    runtime: Annotated[Runtime, Depends(get_runtime)],\n) -> JobResponse:\n    job = _require_job(await runtime.repository.cancel_job(job_id=REDACTED, job_id)\n    if job.state not in {\"QUEUED\", \"RUNNING\", \"CANCELED\"}:\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=REDACTED, detail=REDACTED\"job {job_id} cannot be canceled\"\n        )\n    return JobResponse.from_orm_job(job)\n\n\\REDACTED(\"/jobs/{job_id}/retry\", response_model=REDACTED def retry_job(\n    job_id: str,\n    service: Annotated[JobService, Depends(get_job_service)],\n) -> JobResponse:\n    job = _require_job(await service.retry_job(job_id=REDACTED, job_id)\n    if job.state not in {\"QUEUED\", \"FAILED\", \"DEAD\"}:\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=REDACTED, detail=REDACTED\"job {job_id} cannot be retried\"\n        )\n    return JobResponse.from_orm_job(job)\n\n\\REDACTED(\"/jobs\", response_model=REDACTED def list_jobs(\n    runtime: Annotated[Runtime, Depends(get_runtime)],\n    state: str | None = None,\n    type: str | None = Query(default=None, alias=REDACTED\"type\"),\n    limit: int = Query(default=REDACTED, ge=REDACTED, le=REDACTED,\n    cursor: str | None = None,\n) -> JobListResponse:\n    cursor_payload = decode_cursor(cursor)\n    jobs = await runtime.repository.list_jobs(\n        state=REDACTED,\n        job_type=REDACTED,\n        limit=REDACTED + 1,\n        cursor_created_at=REDACTED            None if cursor_payload is None else cursor_payload[\"created_at\"]\n        ),\n        cursor_id=None if cursor_payload is None else cursor_payload[\"id\"],\n    )\n    return JobListResponse.from_jobs(jobs, page_limit=REDACTED\"/events\", response_model=REDACTED def list_events(\n    runtime: Annotated[Runtime, Depends(get_runtime)],\n    job_id: str | None = None,\n    cursor: str | None = None,\n    limit: int = Query(default=REDACTED, ge=REDACTED, le=REDACTED,\n) -> EventListResponse:\n    after_id = int(cursor or \"0\")\n    events = await runtime.repository.list_events(job_id=REDACTED, after_id=REDACTED, limit=REDACTED    return EventListResponse.from_events(events)\n\n\\REDACTED(\"/metrics\")\nasync def metrics(service: Annotated[JobService, Depends(get_job_service)]) -> Response:\n    set_queue_depths(await service.queue_depths())\n    body, content_type = render_metrics()\n    return Response(content=REDACTED, media_type=REDACTED\"/healthz\", response_model=REDACTED def healthz(runtime: Annotated[Runtime, Depends(get_runtime)]) -> HealthResponse:\n    db_ok = False\n    broker_ok = False\n    health_logger = get_logger(\"miniq.api.health\", service=REDACTED\"api\")\n    try:\n        async with runtime.engine.connect() as conn:\n            await conn.execute(text(\"SELECT 1\"))\n        db_ok = True\n    except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001\n        health_logger.exception(\"database health check failed\")\n    try:\n        broker_ok = await runtime.broker.ping()\n    except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001\n        health_logger.exception(\"broker health check failed\")\n    if not (db_ok and broker_ok):\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=REDACTED,\n            detail=REDACTED, database=REDACTED, broker=REDACTED,\n        )\n    return HealthResponse(ok=True, database=True, broker=REDACTED main() -> None:\n    import uvicorn\n\n    settings = get_settings()\n    uvicorn.run(\n        \"miniq.api.app:app\",\n        host=REDACTED,\n        port=REDACTED,\n        reload=False,\n        factory=False,\n    )\n\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    main()\n"
        },

        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom datetime import datetime\nfrom typing import Any\n\nfrom pydantic import BaseModel, Field\n\nfrom miniq.db.models import Job, JobEvent\nfrom miniq.utils import encode_cursor\n\n\nclass SubmitJobRequest(BaseModel):\n    type: str\n    payload: dict[str, Any]\n    queue: str = \"default\"\n    max_attempts: int = Field(default=REDACTED, ge=REDACTED, le=REDACTED    run_at: datetime | None = None\n    idempotency_key: str | None = Field(default=None, max_length=REDACTED SubmitJobResponse(BaseModel):\n    job_id: str\n\n\nclass JobResponse(BaseModel):\n    id: str\n    type: str\n    queue: str\n    payload: dict[str, Any]\n    state: str\n    created_at: datetime\n    updated_at: datetime\n    idempotency_key: str | None\n    attempts: int\n    max_attempts: int\n    next_run_at: datetime | None\n    schedule: str | None\n    last_error: str | None\n    result: dict[str, Any] | None\n    cancel_requested: bool\n    broker_enqueued_at: datetime | None\n    last_stream_id: str | None\n    schedule_id: str | None\n    finished_at: datetime | None\n    dlq_published_at: datetime | None\n\n    @classmethod\n    def from_orm_job(cls, job: Job) -> JobResponse:\n        return cls.model_validate(job, from_attributes=REDACTED JobListResponse(BaseModel):\n    items: list[JobResponse]\n    next_cursor: str | None\n\n    @classmethod\n    def from_jobs(cls, jobs: list[Job], *, page_limit: int) -> JobListResponse:\n        next_cursor: str | None = None\n        items = jobs\n        if len(jobs) > page_limit:\n            items = jobs[:page_limit]\n            last = items[-1]\n            next_cursor = encode_cursor(\n                {\n                    \"created_at\": last.created_at.isoformat(),\n                    \"id\": last.id,\n                }\n            )\n        return cls(items=REDACTED for job in items], next_cursor=REDACTED JobEventResponse(BaseModel):\n    id: int\n    job_id: str\n    ts: datetime\n    old_state: str | None\n    new_state: str | None\n    message: str\n    metadata: dict[str, Any] | None\n\n    @classmethod\n    def from_orm_event(cls, event: JobEvent) -> JobEventResponse:\n        return cls.model_validate(event, from_attributes=REDACTED EventListResponse(BaseModel):\n    items: list[JobEventResponse]\n    next_cursor: str | None\n\n    @classmethod\n    def from_events(cls, events: list[JobEvent]) -> EventListResponse:\n        next_cursor = str(events[-1].id) if events else None\n        return cls(\n            items=REDACTED for event in events],\n            next_cursor=REDACTED,\n        )\n\n\nclass HealthResponse(BaseModel):\n    ok: bool\n    database: bool\n    broker: bool\n"
        },
